MoveOutEips.clientToken: Idempotency token, see [clientToken](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
MoveOutEips.moveOutEips: List of EIPs to remove, including IPv4 and IPv6 EIPs
MoveOutEips.moveOutEips.eip: IP address of the EIP to remove
MoveOutEips.moveOutEips.bandwidthInMbps: Bandwidth of the EIP after removal, in Mbps (required only for EIPs native to the shared bandwidth)
MoveOutEips.moveOutEips.billing: Billing information of the EIP after removal, postpaid only (required only for EIPs native to the shared bandwidth)
